name: Seasoned Turkey Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients.
2. Shape into four or five 1/2 inch thick patties.
3. Prepare your grill, stove, oven or microwave.
4. Cook for 4 minutes each side.
- For microwave: cook for 2 minutes on each side.
5. Occasionally brush with broth, butter, or barbecue sauce.
